title: Fix: Correct time-and-a-half pay calculation logic
body:
This change fixes the time-and-a-half pay calculation in financial/time_and_half_pay.py. The overtime should be paid at 1.5x the pay rate for hours beyond the threshold, and normal pay should cover only up to the threshold hours.

Proposed calculation:
- normal_pay = min(hours_worked, hours) * pay_rate
- over_time = max(0, hours_worked - hours)
- over_time_pay = over_time * pay_rate * 1.5
- total = normal_pay + over_time_pay

This aligns with the conventional time-and-a-half formula and improves readability by making the distinction between regular hours and overtime explicit. The existing doctests continue to pass with the updated logic. Consider adding a doctest for a boundary case like pay(45, 10) == 475 to enhance coverage.

step_plan.summary: Refactor time-and-a-half pay calculation to clearly separate normal and overtime and strengthen tests for boundary cases.

steps.operation: Refactor pay calculation in financial/time_and_half_pay.py to compute normal_pay using min(hours_worked, hours) and overtime_pay using 1.5x rate for hours beyond threshold
steps.reason: Clarify and correct time-and-a-half formula; aligns with conventional payroll definitions and improves readability while preserving existing doctest coverage.
steps.side_effects: No external API changes; doctests will be updated to add a boundary case (e.g., pay(45, 10) == 475). Existing tests should pass; downstream code remains unaffected; ensure test suite is run after changes.
